newsSince: On June 18, 2026 Belden launched a new suite of IT/OT network products (incl. LioN-X IO-Link Masters). More materially, Belden has a definitive agreement to acquire RUCKUS Networks for ~$1.85B cash (~13x 2026E adj. EBITDA), targeting a 2H26 close, which extends its reach into enterprise/wireless networking. Q2-26 guidance ($735-750M revenue, $1.53-1.63 GAAP EPS) reaffirms AI/IT-OT data-layer momentum.

sources.label: GuruFocus - Belden advanced IT/OT network solutions

verdicts.rankRationale: Hold rank 1. IT/OT-convergence/edge-AI data-layer thesis intact. No new catalyst since June 9; RUCKUS deal and Q1/Q2 numbers already priced into prior case. +8% move is sentiment, not fresh evidence. Long tail of latent-node thesis unchanged.
verdicts.bull: RUCKUS adds full-stack IT/OT networking; data-center/edge cabling demand and solutions mix lift margins.
verdicts.neutral: Quality compounder but no new datapoint since June 9; deal still pending regulatory close.
verdicts.bear: RUCKUS integration/regulatory risk; AI-data-layer link is indirect vs core-bottleneck names.
